response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 19 years of diverse experience, this role requires deep C++ expertise, industrial cybersecurity knowledge (IEC 62443), and multi-threaded systems architecture. The resume shows only 6 months of professional C++ work over a decade ago, with primary focus on JavaScript/TypeScript and full-stack web development. The absence of industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus), or secure development lifecycle practices disqualifies this candidate for a Senior C++ Developer role in manufacturing automation.
strengths: 19 years of professional experience exceeding the 8-12 year requirement with proven software craftsmanship and TDD expertise
Proficiency in advantageous technologies including React, Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS cloud CDK experience
Strong agile collaboration skills, mentoring capability, and track record of creating technical workshops and courses
concerns: Minimal C++ experience: only 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 with no recent or substantive depth in the language
No evidence of IEC 62443 compliance, Secure Development Lifecycle practices, or industrial cybersecurity knowledge critical to the role
No industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or manufacturing background; primary expertise in web/full-stack JavaScript development

key_factors.factor: C++ expertise and recent professional depth
Overall software engineering maturity and craftsmanship
